verses.1: A Song of degrees. In my distress I cried to the LORD, and he heard me.
verses.2: Deliver my soul, O LORD, from lying lips, and from a deceitful tongue.
verses.3: What shall be given to thee? or what shall be done to thee, thou false tongue?
verses.4: Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of juniper.
verses.5: Woe is me, that I sojourn in Mesech, that I dwell in the tents of Kedar!
verses.6: My soul hath long dwelt with him that hateth peace.
verses.7: I am for peace: but when I speak, they are for war.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
